text: pharmacology is continuously contextualized against real-world decision-making. The manuscript outlines an AI ecosystem that is ethically grounded, mechanistically informed, and enriched through pharmacovigilance data and systematic clinician input. By operationalizing human-in-the-loop learning as a core design principle, this framework establishes human-augmented AI as a foundational paradigm for future DDI research, drug development, and personalized medication safety.
